red_flag: Only says free, no license text
why_it_matters: Free can mean personal-use, non-commercial, attribution-required, or unclear
action: Find the original license page or replace the asset

red_flag: Directory tag only, no creator/source confirmation
why_it_matters: Directory metadata can be incomplete or outdated
action: Check the creator/source page and record evidence

red_flag: Attribution required but no credits file
why_it_matters: Credits may be missed during release
Prototype-safe does not always mean commercial-safe
Cannot normally be used in commercial games
Modification or adaptation may be restricted
action: Avoid for game assets that need editing

red_flag: Custom license with no redistribution clause
action: Use only in finished project if allowed; do not repackage
Log source URL and download date

red_flag: Font used like a normal image/audio asset

why_it_matters: Ownership, training, or platform policy questions may exist
action: Flag and verify before relying on it
